title: ActiveCampaign vs Constant Contact (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: ActiveCampaign vs Constant Contact: compare pricing, features, and real use cases to find the right email tool for your needs.
h1: ActiveCampaign vs Constant Contact: Side-by-Side Comparison (2025)
intro: Choosing between ActiveCampaign and Constant Contact comes down to your specific use case. Both are legitimate email marketing platforms, but they serve different audiences. ActiveCampaign is built for businesses needing advanced automation and CRM, while Constant Contact targets nonprofits and local businesses. This comparison covers the key differences so you can decide quickly.

comparison_table.tool_a: Businesses Needing Advanced Automation And Crm

choose_a_if: You are primarily focused on businesses needing advanced automation and CRM
choose_b_if: You are primarily focused on nonprofits and local businesses

faq.q: Is ActiveCampaign better than Constant Contact?
faq.a: It depends on your use case. ActiveCampaign wins for businesses needing advanced automation and CRM, while Constant Contact is stronger for nonprofits and local businesses. Neither is objectively better — the right choice depends on your specific needs.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, ActiveCampaign or Constant Contact?
faq.a: Constant Contact starts at a lower price point ($12/mo vs $15/mo). However, pricing scales with subscriber count, so the total cost depends on your list size.

faq.q: Can I switch from Constant Contact to ActiveCampaign?
faq.a: Yes, switching from Constant Contact to ActiveCampaign is possible. Most platforms support CSV import/export for subscriber lists. Plan for some time to recreate automations and templates, as these rarely transfer directly between platforms.
